related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[April 10, 2025] At 8:00 AM, Christopher drove alone to campus. He told the car: 'I need to focus on my lecture notes today, set the ambient light to my preferred color.' He set the ambient light to green.
[March 20, 2025] At 6:00 PM, Susan was driving Christopher home. Susan told Christopher: 'I've been analyzing that new copper compound all day, I can't stand looking at orange or red tones right now. Let's make it blue.' Susan set the ambient light to blue.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:30 AM, Christopher was driving Susan to a faculty meeting. Christopher said: 'I need to get into the right headspace for my philosophy presentation.' Christopher asked the car: 'Restore the lighting to my usual preference.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[April 25, 2025] At 9:00 AM, Eric was driving alone to the river site. He told the car: 'I want to see the topographic details of the terrain on the screen.' Eric set the instrument panel theme to 'map'.

related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 7:00 AM, Eric was driving alone to a new field site for sampling. He muttered: 'I need to see exactly where the elevation changes are for this drive.' He asked the car: 'Switch the display back to the mode I used for the river site trip.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
